# The Water Main Grille

> A family-run breakfast & lunch spot in the historic south end of Wadsworth, Ohio, homemade food, generous portions, honest prices, and a side of small-town charm.

## Business facts
- Business: The Water Main Grille
- Location: Wadsworth, OH
- Phone: (330) 331-7757
- Service area: Wadsworth, OH, Medina County, OH
- Rating: 4.7 stars (370 reviews)
- Hours: Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday: 06:00-14:00

## Key pages
- https://www.watermainwadsworth.com/
- https://www.watermainwadsworth.com/menu/
- https://www.watermainwadsworth.com/catering/
- https://www.watermainwadsworth.com/history/

- https://www.watermainwadsworth.com/terms/
- https://www.watermainwadsworth.com/accessibility/

## Common questions
- What are The Water Main Grille’s hours? We’re open Tuesday through Saturday, 6:00 am to 2:00 pm, and closed Sunday and Monday. Breakfast is served all day; lunch runs 11am–2pm.
- Where is The Water Main Grille located? We’re right on Main Street at 339 Main St, Wadsworth, OH 44281, in the historic south end of town. There’s plenty of parking on Main Street, Water Street, or in the lot across from the Junk Store.
- Do you offer carry-out or curbside pickup? Yes, call us at (330) 331-7757 for carry-out or curbside pickup and we’ll have your order ready when you are.
- Do you cater events? We do. From weddings and corporate events to private parties and school functions, we bring the same homemade quality to your event. Call (330) 331-7757 to book.

## Contact
Call (330) 331-7757 for more information.
